channel.title: School on Obert Guo
channel.description: Recent content in School on Obert Guo

item.title: Grade 11 Chemistry
item.description: Google Doc Notes Link Grade 10 Review Zac’s Grade 11 Chemistry Notes Zac’s Grade 10 Chemistry Notes Grade 9 Chemistry Notes Grade 10 Chemistry Notes Mixtures & Pure Substances Pure substances cannot be broken down by physical means - only chemical means Substances contain 2+ substances not joined together by chemical means Mixtures: Homogenous (solution) : Uniform appearance Heterogeneous: Distinctly different substances can be seen (phases) Pure Substances Element Atoms Molecules (where 2+ atoms of the same element are bonded bonded together.
